reviews.comment:
Es la única gasolinería del pueblo de iglesia, este fin de semana largo fui a cargar gasoil y no le funcionaba la máquina, aveces te piden pagar en efectivo porque tienen problemas de conexión con las tarjetas. Lamentable porque no solo allí llega la gente que va a pasar el fin de semana sino que van de paso los que viajan a Chile por agua negra y quieren recargar el tanque y no pueden..... La cafetería muy bien, excelente la atención de las chicas ...

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station in the town of Iglesia. This past long weekend I went to fill up with diesel and the pump wasn't working. Sometimes they ask you to pay in cash because they have connection problems with the cards. It's a shame because it's not just people who come for the weekend who stop there, but also those traveling to Chile for Agua Negra who want to fill up their tanks and can't... The cafeteria is very good, the service from the girls is excellent...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNExEWGRREAE

reviews.comment:
Inmediatamente después de que cargamos nafta infinia el auto empezó a fallar, lo llevamos al mecánico y encontró agua y mugre en el carburador.

(Translated by Google)
Immediately after we filled up with Infinia gasoline, the car started malfunctioning. We took it to the mechanic, and he found water and dirt in the carburetor.
